entry.title: C++ STL Handbook — Part 2: Dynamic Containers
entry.summary: Dynamic containers are the bread and butter of competitive programming and systems engineering.
entry.content:
Dynamic containers are the bread and butter of competitive programming and systems engineering.

We cover:

  • std::vector: The workhorse
  • std::list: Doubly linked list
  • std::deque: Double-ended queue

Understanding when to use each is crucial for performance.

entry.title: C++ STL Handbook — Part 1: The Foundation
entry.summary: The Standard Template Library (STL) is a powerful set of C++ template classes to provide common programming data structures and functions such as lists, stacks, arrays, etc.
entry.content:
The Standard Template Library (STL) is a powerful set of C++ template classes to provide common programming data structures and functions such as lists, stacks, arrays, etc.

In this post, we explore the core philosophy of STL, including:

  • Containers
  • Iterators
  • Algorithms

Stay tuned for the deep dive!
